backend/main.mo: Motoko actor for the Coal & Curry backend that manages reservations (CRUD with sorting by date/time), newsletter subscribers (dedup via Set), and reviews (rating validation, top reviews filter) using Map/Set storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (visual theme, menu data, category tabs, dish cards, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON dictionary summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, components, data files, and public assets for the Coal & Curry restaurant app.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA with a root div, UTF-8/viewport meta tags, and a module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers on all paths except /cart and /checkout, with a sitemap reference to coalandcurry.com.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing 9 public routes (home, menu, offers, gallery, blog, about, contact, reservation, loyalty) with priorities, change frequencies, and a lastmod of 2026-02-24.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with 11 routes, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and CartProvider, and renders the shared Layout (Navbar, Footer, FloatingReserveButton, ChatbotWidget).
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotP: Chat UI panel component ('Agni' assistant) with a scrollable message thread, quick-reply buttons, and a text input that generates bot responses via getBotResponse utility.
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotW: Floating action button that toggles the ChatbotPanel open/closed, positioned fixed at the bottom-right of the screen with saffron styling.
frontend/src/components/gallery/Lightbox: A fullscreen image lightbox modal component with keyboard navigation (Escape, arrow keys) and prev/next buttons for cycling through an image array.
frontend/src/components/home/CustomerRev: A carousel-style testimonials section that fetches reviews from a backend actor (falling back to static data) and displays three at a time with star ratings and navigation controls.
frontend/src/components/home/HeroSection: The main hero section with a full-screen background image, restaurant title, tagline, CTA buttons linking to the menu and reservation pages, and summary stats.
frontend/src/components/home/InstagramFe: Displays a 6-image Instagram-style grid of static gallery images with hover effects, linking to the restaurant's Instagram profile.
frontend/src/components/home/OffersGalle: A promotional banner section showing three hardcoded limited-time offers (Lunch Combo, Family Feast, Weekend Grill Fest) with a link to the full offers page.
frontend/src/components/home/SignatureDi: Displays a grid of four signature menu items filtered from static menu data, with spice level indicators, veg/non-veg badges, and add-to-cart functionality.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingR: A fixed floating action button in the bottom-right corner that links to the reservation page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: A multi-column site footer with brand info, social links, quick navigation links, menu categories, contact details, and a newsletter signup component.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Responsive fixed navbar for Coal & Curry with scroll-aware styling, active link highlighting, cart item count badge, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: Email newsletter subscription form that calls a mutation hook and displays success, duplicate, or error feedback states.
frontend/src/components/menu/DishCard.ts: Menu item card displaying dish image, veg/non-veg badge, signature tag, spice level, price, and an add/increment/decrement cart control.
frontend/src/components/menu/MenuTabs.ts: Sticky horizontal scrollable tab bar for filtering menu items by category, with an 'All Items' option prepended.
frontend/src/components/offers/Countdown: Live countdown timer component that ticks every second and displays days, hours, minutes, and seconds until a target date.
frontend/src/components/seo/SEOHead.tsx: Headless SEO component that imperatively sets document title, meta tags (description, robots, Open Graph, Twitter Card), canonical link, and JSON-LD schema via useEffect.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Cart context with localStorage persistence that manages cart items (add, remove, update quantity, clear) and exposes totalItems and subtotal computed values.
frontend/src/context/LanguageContext.tsx: Language context supporting English and Tamil toggling, with a typed translation lookup function covering all UI string keys.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Alternative cart context (using MenuItem type) with localStorage persistence, providing cartItems, cartCount, cartTotal, and CRUD operations for cart management.
frontend/src/data/menuData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and exported data arrays for menu items and categories used in a South Indian restaurant app, including fields like price, spice level, and dietary flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including reviews, reservations, and newsletter subscriptions via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for a restaurant-themed design system including saffron, turmeric, and spice color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component for the Coal & Curry restaurant, displaying the brand story, chef profiles, and hygiene certifications with SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Renders the Coal & Curry blog page with a static list of six food/culture articles, each displaying a title, excerpt, category badge, date, read time, and image. Includes SEO metadata via SEOHead.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Displays the shopping cart page with item list, quantity controls, remove buttons, and an order summary with total. Uses the CartContext for state and links to the checkout page.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Multi-step checkout flow (order type → details → payment → confirmation) with a simulated payment delay and order ID generation. Uses CartContext and renders SEO-noindexed metadata.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page showing restaurant address, phone, email, business hours, social links, a WhatsApp link, and a simple contact form with submission state. Includes SEO metadata via SEOHead.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Photo gallery page organized into four sections (charcoal cooking, interiors, food photography, celebrations) with a lightbox component supporting prev/next navigation. Includes SEO metadata via SEOHead.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: The Home page assembles the restaurant's landing page with a hero section, features strip, signature dishes, about teaser, customer reviews, and quick-info sections, along with JSON-LD structured data for SEO.
frontend/src/pages/Loyalty.tsx: The Loyalty page displays the Coal & Curry rewards program, showing tier levels (Coal to Inferno), program benefits, and a phone-number enrollment form with basic validation.
frontend/src/pages/Menu.tsx: The Menu page renders a searchable, category-filtered grid of 50+ dishes using MenuTabs and DishCard components, with SEO metadata included.
frontend/src/pages/Offers.tsx: The Offers page displays six time-limited promotional deals (e.g., lunch combos, student discounts) in a card grid with countdown timers and a hero banner.
frontend/src/pages/Reservation.tsx: The Reservation page provides a validated table-booking form with fields for name, phone, date, time, guests, occasion, and seating preference, showing a confirmation screen on successful submission.
frontend/src/utils/chatbotResponses.ts: Defines a static keyword-to-response map and a list of quick-reply labels used by the site's chatbot to answer common questions about the menu, hours, location, offers, and more.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Coal & Curry app, extending the theme with South Indian-inspired custom colors (saffron, turmeric, deep-red, cream, charcoal), display/body font families, warm box shadows, border radius tokens, and accordion/fade-in animations.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor (version 3) for the Coal & Curry restaurant app, documenting the app summary, required dish/hero images with dimensions, existing implemented features, known issues, and architectural notes.
